subject: Q1 Marketing Progress Report
body: Marketing Q1 results: Online customer acquisition cost reduced to $6.50/person, total acquisitions 18,000, conversion rate 3.2%. Next quarter plan: expand investment in short video channels.

subject: Technology Department Q1 Summary
body: Technology Q1: Completed microservice migration. System uptime improved from 99.5% to 99.9%. API response time optimized from 200ms to 80ms. Pending: Database sharding plan not yet completed.

subject: Product Department Quarterly Review
body: Product Q1: Launched 12 new features, user satisfaction score 4.3/5. Key feature: Smart recommendation engine launched, DAU increased by 15%. Next quarter focus: Internationalization adaptation.

subject: Customer Success Department Update
body: Customer Success Q1: Renewal rate 92%, NPS improved from 35 to 42. 1 enterprise customer churned (reason: budget cuts), 3 new enterprise customers signed.

subject: Finance Department Quarterly Summary
body: Q1 revenue $4M, up 22% year-over-year. Gross margin 68%, up 3 percentage points from last quarter. Cash flow healthy, cash on hand $7.5M. Watch item: Accounts receivable days increased from 45 to 52 days.
